NAME

SYNOPSIS

DESCRIPTION

The and functions append a copy of the null-terminated string to the end of the null-terminated string then add a terminating The string must have sufficient space to hold the result. The function appends not more than characters.

RETURN VALUES

The and functions return the pointer
